message:
fix: unsling uses ResolveHookDir for correct beads path in crew workspaces

The read path in unsling.go manually constructed the beads directory,
resolving to e.g. gastown/ which has no .beads DB. Use ResolveHookDir
(prefix-based resolution) to follow .beads/redirect to the rig DB,
matching the write path fix from 1e97d1e6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
